title: Ethana Capability Validation Output
description: Machine-readable output produced by the ethana-capability-validation skill.

capability_name.description: Exact name of the capability as it appears in canonical-product-model.md

validated_status.description: Status adjudicated from canonical-product-model.md. Unresolved indicates canonical model has no entry and escalation is required.

canonical_entry_verbatim.description: Verbatim quote of the canonical-product-model.md entry for this capability. Required when validated_status is Production, In Build, or Aspirational.

mandatory_caveats.description: Mandatory caveats from the canonical model entry that must accompany all customer-facing claims about this capability.

scope_boundaries.description: Confirmed scope (covers) and exclusions (does not cover) as derived from canonical-product-model.md.

ecs.description: Evidence Confidence Score. 0 when validated_status is In Build or Aspirational and a Production claim is being evaluated (Path B/C cap applies).

ecs_band.description: ECS band derived from the score.

ecs_path.description: ECS computation path selected based on claimed status vs. canonical status.

ecs_arithmetic.description: Human-readable ECS arithmetic showing base score plus all adjustments applied.

allowed_claims.description: Claims approved for use in downstream outputs. Each entry has a specific CPL. Aspirational capabilities must produce an empty array.

claim_text.description: Exact, quotable claim text ready for use in a downstream output without further rewriting.

cpl.description: CPL-1 = Unrestricted. CPL-2 = Advisory-restricted. CPL-3 = Conversation-only. CPL-4 = Internal-only.

permitted_contexts.description: Contexts in which this claim may be used without modification.

required_caveat.description: Caveat text that must accompany this claim before formal use.

evidence_basis.description: Source and ECS basis for this claim.

prohibited_claims.description: Claims that must not appear in any downstream output at any CPL level. All entries are CPL-5.

claim_text.description: The specific claim or claim pattern that is prohibited.

prohibition_reason.description: Reason from the approved prohibition list.

risk_if_used.description: Specific business or regulatory risk if this claim is used in a customer-facing context.

source_name.description: Exact file name or document reference.

claim_made.description: The specific claim or entry from this source.

escalation_required.description: True when ECS < 45 or status is Unresolved.

interim_position.description: What may and may not be said while escalation is pending.

hard_disqualifiers_triggered.description: List of hard disqualifiers triggered. Empty array = no disqualifiers.

phase_9_gate_completed.description: Confirms all 7 Phase 9 gate steps were completed.

validation_date.description: ISO 8601 date on which this validation was performed.
